title: The future of software engineering, tokenmaxxing and AI in higher education
summary: IBM's Mixture of Experts podcast covers how AI is transforming software engineering roles, the practice of tokenmaxxing as companies exhaust budgets rapidly, NVIDIA's RTX Spark superchip enabling large language models on personal computers, and challenges for universities in preparing students for AI-driven workplaces through mandatory AI literacy courses.
